title: Director of Curriculum and Instruction

St. Marys, Beeville TX 78102.

title: Executive Director of Teaching, Learning, and Innovation
notes: Tarrant County district (~3,500 students) west of Fort Worth in River Oaks/Sansom Park area. Offers free full-day Pre-K. Dr. June Ritchlin (ritchlinj@castleberryisd.net) is Executive Director of Educational Leadership, secondary contact. Email pattern lastnamefirstinitial@castleberryisd.net confirmed via TEA grant docs. Castleberry HS undergoing $98M expansion through 2026 -- strong investment signal. Administration 5228 Ohio Garden Road, River Oaks TX.

Sullivan likely permanent target now. Email inferred from district FLast@centerville.k12.tx.us pattern (Dickey email confirmed). Central office 813 South Commerce, Centerville TX 75833.

title: Director of Early Childhood
notes: Tarrant County district (~13,000 students) -- one of the highest-priority ICP fits in this batch. GCISD operates an Early Childhood Development Center plus a new Pre-K 3 program added Aug 2025 (~26% revenue increase projected). Uses Frog Street curriculum districtwide. Pre-K 4 and Pre-K 3 applications open annually (Jan/Feb). Brown approved by Board as Director of Early Childhood June 19. Also serves as director of elementary English/language arts and early childhood education -- ECE is fully consolidated under her. Email inferred from first.last@gcisd.net pattern (her LinkedIn handle is kristiabrown). STRONG buying signal: PreK expansion + named ECE director + dedicated ECDC facility. Address 3051 Ira E. Woods Ave., Grapevine TX 76051.
